prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东北农业大学在上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约20185名→19765名→19158名→19008名→31381名。2021–2024年位次在19000–20200区间窄幅波动，整体略有前移趋势；2025年出现大幅后移至31381名，主要原因是工商管理（中美121双学位项目）专业录取位次低至31381名，拉低了校整体最低位次；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为5人，2026年增至7人，扩招幅度约40%。扩招意味着竞争压力相对减轻，对位次有后移（数字增大）作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第120名（2026年），近年排名稳定在116–122区间，属于中游偏上的211院校；该校在声誉舆情监测中未出现明显负面或正面事件，舆情平稳；抖音综合热度排名第95位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等偏低水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；历史投档异常记录中无该校断档或暴跌记录；第五轮学科评估中，食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融学类、食品科学与工程类（属农林食品方向，社会热度一般）、工商管理（中美121项目，社会热度偏冷）。上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年49276人增加约35%，竞争显著加剧，对位次有前移（数字减小）作用；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距上海较远，上海考生对东北地区高校的地域偏好整体偏弱，但该校211层次对部分考生仍有吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常（工商管理中美121项目拉低至31381名）、2026年扩招40%（5→7人）对位次的后移作用，以及上海市考生总数大幅增加约35%对位次的前移作用，两者大致抵消但考生增加效应略强。，结合考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧，预测2026年最低录取位次约为38410名，区间37910–38910名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融学类（含金融学、国际经济与贸易专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 食品科学与工程类（含食品科学与工程、食品质量与安全、粮食工程、乳品工程、食品营养与健康专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理（中美121双学位项目，与美国北卡罗来纳大学彭布洛克分校合作）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间37910–38910名内的考生，建议以二档食品科学与工程类为主力填报，该专业为A-学科，性价比高；一档金融学类可作为冲刺选择；三档工商管理（中美121）因出国要求特殊，仅适合有明确留学意愿且位次偏后的考生作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<37910名）可重点冲刺金融学类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Northeast Agricultural University in Shanghai's comprehensive category were approximately 20185 → 19765 → 19158 → 19008 → 31381. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 19000–20200 range, showing a slight overall upward trend; in 2025, there was a significant drop to 31381, mainly due to the Business Administration (China-US 121 Dual Degree Program) major having a low admission ranking of 31381, pulling down the overall minimum ranking of the university. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Shanghai was 5 students from 2021 to 2025, increasing to 7 students in 2026, an expansion of about 40%. Expansion means relatively reduced competition pressure, which has a backward (numerical increase) effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks approximately 120th (2026) on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 116–122 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 institutions. In reputation monitoring, no significant negative or positive events have been observed; public sentiment is stable. On Douyin, its comprehensive popularity ranks 95th, rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a moderately low level, showing no abnormal surge in application attention. There are no records of historical admission anomalies such as gaps or sharp drops. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in admissions, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance, Food Science and Engineering (agriculture and food direction, generally average social popularity), Business Administration (China-US 121 project, relatively low social popularity). In 2026, the total number of Shanghai college entrance exam takers is about 66,700, an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition, which has a forward (numerical decrease) effect on rankings. Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Shanghai. Shanghai students generally have weak regional preference for universities in Northeast China, but the 211 level still attracts some applicants.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal ranking in 2025 (Business Administration China-US 121 project pulled down to 31381), the backward effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of 40% (5 to 7 students), and the forward effect of a significant increase of about 35% in the number of Shanghai exam takers, these factors roughly offset each other, but the increase in exam takers has a slightly stronger effect. Combined with intensified competition due to the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 38410, with a range of 37910–38910.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Finance (including Finance, International Economics and Trade majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Food Science and Engineering (including Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Grain Engineering, Dairy Engineering, Food Nutrition and Health majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (China-US 121 Dual Degree Program, in cooperation with University of North Carolina at Pembroke, USA).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 37910–38910 are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 Food Science and Engineering, which is an A- discipline with high cost-effectiveness. Tier 1 Finance can be a reach choice. Tier 3 Business Administration (China-US 121) has special study abroad requirements and is only suitable as a safety option for candidates with clear study abroad intentions and lower rankings. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<37910) can focus on reaching for Finance.
